description_long: This is an adult woman dressed in formal business attire, featuring a tailored double-breasted blazer with lapels, a collared shirt, and a necktie. She wears fitted trousers and formal shoes, presenting a professional and polished appearance. Her hands are relaxed at her sides, and her posture is upright and confident. The figure has voluminous, curly hair styled in a rounded shape. The clothing is well-fitted, with visible seams and cuffs, and the shoes are low-heeled and closed-toe. The overall look is that of a business professional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, streets, or public transportation.
description: A professionally dressed adult woman in a business suit with a collared shirt, necktie, and formal shoes, standing upright with curly hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full business suit, necktie, collared shirt, and facial features with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the volume of the curly hair, and the fitted nature of the blazer and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the blazer, the fit of the trousers, and the rounded shape of the hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair volume, and the straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with a collared shirt and necktie
